visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border with 10% opacity, never completely transparent
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows for floating elements
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10 for dark mode headers, bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-black/5 for light mode

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with asymmetric spans
grids.dashboard: High Density Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4, every pixel utilized

layouts.header: Sticky with glassmorphism, NO fully transparent backgrounds
layouts.sidebar: Fixed width, dense icon+text navigation, collapsible
layouts.main_content: Padded container with max-width for marketing, full-width fluid for trading interface

components.buttons: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md) with bold text. Primary buttons use #F7931A with black text.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift.
components.tables: Shadcn Table, dense padding, numeric columns aligned right, mono font for prices.
components.charts: Recharts with customized tooltips and axis matching the theme colors.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on all rows, active states on tabs.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for list items and cards.

accessibility.contrast: APCA contrast ratios met, especially for text over charts
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes

images.description: Abstract green light trails on black background for landing page hero section
Professional analyzing stock market graphs for 'Pro Trading' feature section

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust trading dashboard. The UI must be dense, data-heavy, and professional like Binance.
Use Shadcn UI extensively (Tables, Tabs, Dialogs, Select, Input, DropdownMenu).
Implement real-time crypto prices using CoinGecko API integration.
Create a toggle for Dark/Light mode, defaulting to Dark Mode.
Ensure all numbers, prices, and tickers use the 'JetBrains Mono' font for tabular alignment.
The Buy/Sell panel should use high-contrast Red (Sell) and Green (Buy) buttons.
Do NOT use generic 'centered' marketing text. Use strong left-aligned typography.
Apply 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
Ensure the layout is responsive: sidebars hide or collapse on mobile, charts stack.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Use layered design elements.
Never center-align the main app container.
Do not use AI assistant emojis for icons.
Add micro-animations to every interactive element.
Components MUST use named exports, Pages MUST use default exports.
